site.name: Guru Ankam
site.description: Guru Ankam — Photographer · Drummer · Developer · Creative
site.bio: Multi-disciplinary creative based somewhere between the viewfinder, the drum kit, the keyboard, and the sketchpad. I believe the best work happens at the intersection of disciplines.

slides.title: Golden Hour Series
slides.description: Chasing the last light across city rooftops. A series of warm-toned captures from sunset sessions.

slides.title: Groove Sessions
slides.description: Live drum recordings from the studio — exploring polyrhythms and pocket grooves.

slides.title: Portfolio v3
slides.description: This very website you are looking at. Built with Astro and Tailwind CSS.

slides.title: Neon Dreams
slides.description: Storyboard for a short film concept exploring urban nightlife and solitude.

about.title: The Person Behind the Pixels
bio: Hey, I am Guru Ankam — a multi-disciplinary creative based somewhere between the viewfinder, the drum kit, the keyboard, and the sketchpad.
I am a photographer who chases light, a drummer who lives for the pocket, a software engineer who builds with intention, and a creative who ties it all together through storyboarding and visual art.

I believe the best work happens at the intersection of disciplines. A photograph teaches you about composition. Drumming teaches you about timing. Code teaches you about structure. And storyboarding teaches you about narrative. Together, they shape how I see and create.
This portfolio is a window into my world — each section representing a different facet of who I am and what I do. Take a look around.

facts.text: Photographer — Landscapes, portraits, and street photography
Creative — Storyboarding, art, and visual design

photography.title: Photography
photography.description: A collection of frames that speak louder than words. Every shot is a story, every shadow a feeling.

collections.title: Flora & Fauna
collections.description: Close-up studies of nature's details — petals, leaves, dragonflies, and the quiet beauty of the natural world.

music.title: The Beat Goes On
music.description: Drummer at heart. Rhythm is the foundation of everything I do — whether it's behind a kit, in code, or through a lens.
music.influences: From the polyrhythmic complexity of jazz to the raw energy of rock, and the intricate patterns of Indian percussion — rhythm knows no boundaries.

audioClips.title: Pocket Groove
audioClips.description: A tight funk groove with ghost notes on the snare.

audioClips.title: Polyrhythm Study
audioClips.description: Exploring 3 over 4 polyrhythmic patterns on the kit.

audioClips.title: Indian Taal
audioClips.description: Tintal cycle adapted for the drum kit.

code.title: Building Things
code.description: Software engineer by trade, builder by nature. Here are some projects I have been working on.

projects.title: Project One
projects.description: A brief description of what this project does and the tech used.
projects.longDescription: This is a detailed write-up about the project. It covers the architecture decisions, challenges faced, and solutions implemented. You can write multiple paragraphs here using the admin panel.
projects.techDetails: Built with React 18, TypeScript, and Node.js. Uses PostgreSQL for data storage and Redis for caching.

projects.title: Project Two
projects.description: Another project showcasing a different set of skills and technologies.
projects.longDescription: Detailed write-up for project two. Describe the problem space, your approach, and the outcome.
projects.techDetails: Python backend with FastAPI, PostgreSQL database, deployed on AWS.

projects.title: Project Three
projects.description: An open-source contribution or side project you are proud of.
projects.longDescription: Write about what inspired this project and what you learned building it.
projects.techDetails: Static site with Astro, styled with Tailwind CSS.

creative.title: Visions & Stories
creative.description: Where imagination takes shape — storyboards, art, and everything in between.

works.title: Storyboard Project
works.longDescription: A deep dive into the process of creating this storyboard. From initial concept sketches to final panel layouts, this project explores visual narrative techniques.

works.title: Art Piece One
works.longDescription: An exploration of color theory and emotional resonance through abstract composition.

works.title: Concept Design
works.longDescription: Concept art for an imagined world. Combining architectural influences with organic forms.
